message.content:
All tools are working! 🎉 

I tested:
1. **bash_notify-send** - Successfully sent a desktop notification
2. **bash_display_large_text** - Displayed the markdown info panel (which you just saw)

The **bash_ask_user** tool is also available and ready to use - it can create:
- Text entry dialogs
- Yes/No questions
- List selection dialogs
- File pickers

Would you like me to test the interactive dialog tool as well, or is there something specific you'd like to do with these tools?
message.reasoning_content: The markdown display tool also worked. I've successfully demonstrated the notification tool and the display tool. The ask_user tool is also available but I haven't demonstrated it yet. Let me provide a summary to the user.

function.arguments:
{"text": "# 🛠️ Tool Testing Complete!

## Available Tools Tested:

| Tool | Status | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `bash_notify-send` | ✅ Working | Desktop notifications |
| `bash_display_large_text` | ✅ Working | Display markdown content |
| `bash_ask_user` | ⏳ Ready | Interactive dialogs (entry, yes/no, list, file) |

### What each tool can do:

1. **notify-send** - Shows desktop notifications
2. **display_large_text** - Displays formatted markdown in a viewer
3. **ask_user** - Creates interactive dialogs for:
   - Text entry
   - Yes/No questions
   - List selections
   - File pickers

---
*All tools are functional and ready to use!*"}
function.name: bash_display_large_text

contents.description: Displays interactive dialogs to ask the user for input using zenity. Supports text entry, yes/no questions, list selection, and file selection dialogs.
contents.name: bash_ask_user

properties.propertyDescription: Type of dialog: 'entry' for text input, 'question' for yes/no, 'list' for selection, 'file' for file picker
The prompt or question text to display in the dialog
Optional dialog window title
Default value for entry dialogs
For list dialogs: pipe-separated options (e.g., 'Option A|Option B|Option C')
For list dialogs: allow multiple selections (true/false)

function.description: Displays interactive dialogs to ask the user for input using zenity. Supports text entry, yes/no questions, list selection, and file selection dialogs.
function.name: bash_ask_user

multiple.description: For list dialogs: allow multiple selections (true/false)

options.description: For list dialogs: pipe-separated options (e.g., 'Option A|Option B|Option C')

text.description: The prompt or question text to display in the dialog

type.description: Type of dialog: 'entry' for text input, 'question' for yes/no, 'list' for selection, 'file' for file picker

contents.description: notify the user with some message on the desktop
contents.name: bash_notify-send

properties.propertyDescription: the message to put in the notification

function.description: notify the user with some message on the desktop
function.name: bash_notify-send

message.description: the message to put in the notification

contents.description: Displays large markdown-formatted text using markdown-eye viewer. The text is passed via stdin and the tool blocks until the user closes the viewer. Note: images are not supported.
contents.name: bash_display_large_text

properties.propertyDescription: The markdown-formatted text to display

function.description: Displays large markdown-formatted text using markdown-eye viewer. The text is passed via stdin and the tool blocks until the user closes the viewer. Note: images are not supported.
function.name: bash_display_large_text
